project.description: Job2 - Test: database connectivity and application smoke test

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -eux
bash /var/jenkins_home/ci-scripts/jenkins-checkout.sh
COMPOSE_PROJECT="${COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME:-hrms-main}" NETWORK="${COMPOSE_PROJECT}_hrms_net"
echo "======================================" echo "Job2 - HRMS Test" echo "Network: ${NETWORK}" echo "======================================"
echo "Step 1: Start database..." docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}" -f docker-compose.yml up -d db
for i in $(seq 1 30); do if docker exec hrms_db mysqladmin ping -h localhost -uroot -p"${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-rootpass}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Database ready" break fi echo "Waiting for DB ($i/30)..." sleep 2 done
echo "Step 2: DB connectivity test..." docker run --rm \ --network "${NETWORK}" \ mysql:8.0 \ mysql -h hrms_db -uhrms_user -phrms_pass hrms_db -e "SELECT 1 AS db_ok"
echo "MySQL version:" docker exec hrms_db mysql -uroot -p"${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-rootpass}" -e "SELECT VERSION();"
echo "Step 3: CI smoke (web container)..." docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}_ci" -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.ci.yml up -d web
success=0 for i in $(seq 1 60); do if docker exec hrms_web_ci curl -fsS -o /dev/null http://localhost/ 2>/dev/null; then echo "Web smoke OK (attempt $i)" success=1 break fi sleep 2 done
docker compose -p "${COMPOSE_PROJECT}_ci" -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.ci.yml down -v || true
if [ "$success" -ne 1 ]; then echo "Web smoke test failed" exit 1 fi
echo "All tests passed"
